overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a rainy night walk through a historic city resembling 19th century New Orleans. The player character walks past classical architecture, encounters a horse-drawn carriage and rider, and proceeds along wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps.

A classical courthouse building with tall columns looms ahead, illuminated by warm street lamps. A trash can and lamp post are visible on the left as the camera approaches the building.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along an iron fence toward the theatre entrance. The vertical 'THEATRE' sign becomes prominent on the building facade, and the wet cobblestones continue to reflect the warm artificial lighting in the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked historic district that transitions from a looming civic center into a wide, atmospheric city street. It begins by advancing along wet cobblestones toward a classical courthouse with tall columns, passing a lamp post and trash can under the glow of warm street lamps. As the camera moves into a more open plaza, the courthouse recedes to the left while a horse-drawn carriage crosses the path from left to right, revealing a statue and balconied buildings. The scene then shifts further down the street, passing a stationary streetcar on the right as the statue fades into the background. Finally, the view opens up to rows of historic balconied architecture lining the left side, with the steady rain continuing to reflect the golden light across the cobblestones.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy street that transitions from an open intersection into the intimate entrance of a grand theatre. It begins as a horse rider crosses the path from left to right, with the camera advancing toward the ornate architecture of the entertainment district. As the movement continues, an iron fence emerges on the right and string lights appear suspended between the buildings, shifting the atmosphere toward a more festive, urban glow. The scene then narrows as the camera tracks along the fence, bringing a prominent vertical theatre sign into sharp focus against the building facade. Finally, the view settles on the theatre entrance, where the heavy rain creates shimmering reflections of warm artificial light across the wet cobblestones.
